subject: Human Resources
title: The Future of Compensation
description: Learn The Future of Compensation in one minute.

hook.text: A company pays employees in real-time—every day after their shift. Weekly and monthly paycycles are becoming obsolete.

buildup.text: Compensation is evolving: on-demand pay, skills-based pay, algorithmic pricing, and global remote salary models are emerging.

discovery.text: Skills-based pay rewards what you can do—not your title or tenure—making compensation more dynamic and meritocratic.

twist.text: AI is entering compensation—analyzing market data in real-time to recommend pay. But algorithms can encode existing biases.

climax.text: The future rewards contribution, adaptability, and skills—requiring compensation systems as agile as the workforce itself.

punchline.text: Pay is catching up to how people actually work now.

quiz.question: What does skills-based pay reward?
options: What employees can do, not their title or tenure
